name: lam
description: LAM — AI personal styling & digital wardrobe (Expo app + Express API + Python AI service)
author: barab2002

scripts.setup: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix app install && npm run setup:ai
scripts.setup:ai: python3 -m venv ai-service/.venv && ai-service/.venv/bin/pip install -r ai-service/requirements-dev.txt
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix server run typecheck && npm --prefix app run typecheck
scripts.test: npm run test:server && npm run test:app && npm run test:ai
scripts.stack: npm run build:web && docker compose up --build
